title: Petromaxu Lightethan Lyrics Aranmanai Song lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Petromaxu Lightethan
Singer(s): Harihara Sudhan, Velmurugan
Movie: Aranmanai
Music: Bharadwaj

Petromaxu lightedhaan venuma
adi perazhagea torchu light uh kasakkuma..(2)

unna paththi over achu feeling uh
unna paththi over achu feeling uh
kaadhal vandhu missed call-il calling-u

heart-ah therandhu kaatava
kaadhal kanava kootava
thottu thodarndhu sollava
tholaindhu ponen allava

Orey oru varthaiyil
love ah solla maattiya.

Petromaxu lightedhaan venuma
adi perazhagea torchu light uh kasakkuma

White pooriyea.. sivandha jaangiriyea..
inch inch-ah unna konja aasa..
Sundhariyea inaikku raathiriyea
unna thaali katti thooki poga aasa.

Unnoda grammer um
ennoda humour um
onnana workout aagum beti.

un cheppal size mudhal
unnoda diet vara
note panni vaipathendhan hobby..

bracket potuten.. unna target akiten..
rocket pola takkunu parakadha..

En heart-ula
neeyum high speedula
odi vandhu u-turn pottu pora

mind voice uh la
unna naan nenacha..
edhira vandhu
angel pola ninna..

Un kaadhal seat uh la
kerchief ah potuten
no ball ah maththidama vaayen.

un veetu dobourman
ippo en friend-uh dhaan
venumna enna pathi kelean

Chinna sammadham
solla enna thaamadham
kaadhal solla
paarvai ondru podhum.

Petromaxu lightedhaan venuma
adi perazhagea torchu light uh kasakkuma

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Petromaxu Lightethan conveys a playful and romantic vibe, reflecting feelings of love and excitement.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Aranmanai, this song adds a lively touch to the narrative, showcasing the characters' joyful moments and romantic interactions.

Who are the singers and music director of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Hariharasudhan and Velmurugan, with music composed by Bharadwaj.

When was this song released?

Petromaxu Lightethan was released on September 5, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Petromaxu Lightethan, the lively beats and catchy lyrics encapsulate the joyous spirit of young love. The song unfolds in a festive atmosphere, where the characters express their feelings through playful banter and dance. It evokes a sense of happiness and celebration, making it perfect for parties and gatherings. The vibrant collaboration between Hariharasudhan and Velmurugan, under Bharadwaj's direction, ensures that this track remains a favorite for many.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Petromaxu Lightethan from the movie Aranmanai is a vibrant celebration of love and joy, brought to life by the dynamic voices of Hariharasudhan and Velmurugan. With Bharadwaj's catchy composition, this song perfectly captures the essence of youthful exuberance and festive spirit. Get ready to groove as this track lights up your playlist!
stanzaMeanings: Do we need a Petromax light? The torchlight will shine brightly.
Thinking too much about you, feeling too much about you, love is calling like a missed call.
My heart is showing love, dreams are gathering, I came and left without saying anything.
Can’t you say love in just one word?
Do we need a Petromax light? The torchlight will shine brightly.
Oh white flower, oh beautiful girl, I have a little desire for you inch by inch. Tonight, I wish to take you away.
Your grammar and my humor will work out together.
From your shoe size to your diet, noting everything has become my hobby.
I’ve set a target for you, like a rocket, I won’t miss it.
In my heart, you come running at high speed and take a U-turn.
When I think of you in my mind's voice, you come like an angel.
I’ve placed a kerchief in your love seat, I won’t let it go without a ball.
Your house's doorman is now my friend, what does he know about me?
To say a little love, just one glance is enough.
Do we need a Petromax light? The torchlight will shine brightly.
